notes: Supply Catalog System: Full material abstraction layer connecting Engineering to Purchasing. Router material assignments with step-level quantity tracking. Automatic shortage detection across active travelers. REQ generation from shortages with vendor selection, conversion factors, and double-order prevention. PO receiving auto-allocation to pre-allocated travelers. Scan-based material consumption with undo support. Reallocation audit trail. Publish/Update preview modal for router broadcasts. Inventory tab overhaul with target display and table normalization. Purchasing document attachments for REQ and PO line items. Chat System: Global chat panel in navigation bar with real-time messaging, channel management, unread notifications, and message reactions. Project Teams Tabs: Project-specific Teams integration with channel templates, project-to-team mapping, and Open in Teams buttons. Performance indexes for REQ, PO, and inventory queries. PO re-approval workflow when new items exceed approved total.
